mapper.delete: DELETE FROM template WHERE template_id = #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select: SELECT template_id, name, description, template_path, preview_url, created_at FROM template ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT template_id, name, description, template_path, preview_url, created_at FROM template ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT template_id, name, description, template_path, preview_url, created_at FROM template ORDER BY created_at DESC
